name: Fresh Tomato Scallop
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onion and butter in a 2-cup glass measure, cover, and microwave on high power for about 1 minute or until tender.
2. Stir in breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, and chopped toasted pecans.
3. Peel tomatoes (if desired) and cut into 1/2-inch slices.
4. Arrange tomato slices in a 9-inch microwave-safe pie plate.
5. Sprinkle with Worchestershire sauce.
6. Cover with wax paper and microwave on high for 2 to 3 minutes, or until almost heated through. Give the plate a half-turn once.
7. Sprinkle crumb mixture over tomatoes.
8. Cook uncovered on high for an additional 30 to 60 seconds (or 1 to 2 minutes at low wattage) until heated through.
Serving size: 128 calories, 4g Protein, 14g Carbohydrates, 7g Fat, 2mg Cholesterol, and 202mg Sodium.
